summary: Reviewed all 3 files for task-001. intake/SKILL.md: 'seed' correctly replaced with 'mission spec' throughout, no residual occurrences. setup/SKILL.md: '(Onboarding)' suffix removed from Phase A-1.5, absorption sentence removed, entire Phase A-1.6 agent migration section removed, dangling input reference removed. mission/references/specifying.md: 'Seed Check' renamed to 'Spec Check', 'Onboard Check' renamed to 'Rules Check'. Grep confirms zero hits for 'seed' and 'onboard' across plugin/. All changes are terminology-only with no behavioral modifications. No structural concerns.
